benefits.description: Acid reflux reduced a bit, not heaps but a small amount. Not enough to make use viable.

protocol_notes: Used standard acetate version of BPC-157 orally at 500mg daily. Noted Arginine version might have been slightly more stable in gut. User noted subsequent dietary changes (ACV, flax seed oil, glutamine, meal timing) were far more effective, reducing antacid use from 60mg daily to one every 2-3 weeks.
